summary: Multi-language support (BS/EN) tested. All 32/32 tests passed. Language toggle works correctly: app defaults to Bosnian, EN switch translates entire UI to English (tab labels, home sections, events header), BS switch restores Bosnian. LanguageContext + translations.ts + AsyncStorage persistence all functioning correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Language toggle TouchableOpacity buttons (BS/EN in ProfileTab) don't have testID attributes in the rendered DOM (testIDs added to code but bundle cache issue during testing). Playwright requires clicking the parent container element (JS parent.click()) rather than inner Text element to trigger onPress. This is normal React Native web behavior and real mobile users won't face this issue.
News category badges ('Kultura', 'Vijesti', 'Turizam') are stored as BS strings in DB - they do not translate. This is expected for DB-stored content categories vs UI strings.
updated_files: /app/frontend/components/ProfileTab.tsx (added testID='lang-btn-bs' and testID='lang-btn-en' to language toggle TouchableOpacity buttons)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-language (BS/EN) feature fully verified. Key: LanguageProvider wraps entire app in _layout.tsx. Language toggle in ProfileTab > 'Jezik / Language' row - BS/EN buttons. Click triggers setLanguage() in LanguageContext, updates AsyncStorage, re-renders all t() calls. All 5 tabs, home sections (Danas u Gradačcu/Today in Gradačac, Blizu tebe/Near you, Posebne ponude/Special offers, Brzi pristup/Quick access), events header (Vijesti i Događaji/News & Events), city news section (Gradske Vijesti/City News), upcoming events (Nadolazeći Događaji/Upcoming Events) - all switching correctly. testIDs tab-home, tab-mapa, tab-rezervacije, tab-favoriti, tab-profil working. lang-btn-bs and lang-btn-en testIDs added to ProfileTab but may need bundle refresh to appear in DOM.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. The Playwright text selector click issue (clicking inner Text vs TouchableOpacity container) is a testing concern only, not a real-user bug.
